name: AR-50 Max
description: Compact and portable scenting machine designed for small enclosed spaces such as elevators and bathrooms. Features a rechargeable battery and patented atomizer technology for quiet and efficient fragrance diffusion, covering up to 50sqm with a 100ml capacity.

name: AR-200
description: Elegant wall-mounted scenting machine designed for large bathrooms, VIP rooms, and private rooms. With Bluetooth and WiFi connectivity, visible oil-level monitoring, and patented atomizer technology, it provides quiet and reliable scent coverage for up to 200sqm.

description: Compact and modern scenting machine ideal for display tables, elevator landings, and small commercial spaces. With Bluetooth and WiFi connectivity and patented atomizer technology, it delivers efficient and quiet fragrance diffusion for up to 150sqm.

description: Stylish and compact scenting machine suitable for elevator landings, display tables, and small commercial areas. Features Bluetooth and WiFi connectivity with patented atomizer technology, delivering quiet fragrance diffusion for spaces up to 150sqm.

description: Commercial-grade scenting machine ideal for large lobbies, living rooms, common areas, and indoor landing spaces. Equipped with Bluetooth and WiFi connectivity, quiet operation, and patented atomizer technology, it provides wide fragrance coverage for areas up to 2000sqm.

name: AR-200
description: Modern black-finish scenting machine designed for premium bathrooms, VIP rooms, and private areas. Features Bluetooth and WiFi connectivity, visible oil-level monitoring, and quiet patented atomizer technology for effective scent coverage up to 200sqm.

name: Small Table Centerpiece
description: Compact Christmas table centerpiece ideal for reception desks, dining tables, concierge counters and café settings. Styled with festive ornaments, florals and seasonal accents to add an elegant holiday touch without occupying too much space.

name: Medium Table Centerpiece
description: Versatile holiday centerpiece designed for dining tables, lobby consoles, meeting rooms and common areas. Creates a warm and festive atmosphere with balanced seasonal styling suitable for hotels, condominiums, restaurants and offices.

name: Tall Table Centerpiece
description: Statement Christmas centerpiece designed for large dining tables, hotel buffets, registration counters and event spaces. Features elevated styling that adds visual impact while maintaining an elegant holiday presentation.

name: Long and Low Table Centerpiece
description: A horizontally styled centerpiece perfect for banquet tables, conference tables and long dining setups. Designed to provide festive elegance without blocking guest interaction or sightlines across the table.

name: Garland Arrangement
description: Decorative Christmas garland arrangement ideal for stair railings, entrances, counters, mantels and hallway accents. Styled with festive foliage, ornaments, ribbons and lighting options to enhance commercial and residential holiday spaces.

description: Classic Christmas wreath arrangement suitable for doors, walls, lobbies, storefronts and feature displays. Available in various sizes and styled with coordinated ornaments, florals, ribbons, and festive accents for a welcoming holiday presentation.

name: Arch Garland Arrangement
description: Custom Christmas arch garland arrangement designed for entrances, stage setups, photo areas and mall or hotel walkways. Creates a festive focal point with layered greenery, ornaments, ribbons and optional lighting elements.

name: Cone Tree
description: Modern decorative cone tree ideal for hotel lobbies, mall displays, entrances and event styling. Designed with festive lighting and coordinated holiday décor for a sleek and space-efficient Christmas installation.

name: Christmas Tree
description: Custom-decorated Christmas trees available in various heights for hotels, malls, condominiums, offices and commercial spaces. Professionally styled with coordinated ornaments, lighting, ribbons, florals and themed holiday décor to create a striking festive centerpiece.

name: 6m Curtain Lights
description: Decorative curtain lighting ideal for walls, windows, stage backdrops and event spaces. Provides a warm and elegant festive glow perfect for hotels, restaurants, malls and holiday installations.

name: Dandelion Lights
description: Decorative LED dandelion lights designed to add sparkle and ambiance to Christmas displays, pathways, gardens and event setups. Creates a magical festive atmosphere for both indoor and outdoor holiday styling.

name: Lighted Topiary
description: Illuminated decorative topiary ideal for entrances, pathways, lobbies and commercial Christmas displays. Combines elegant greenery styling with warm festive lighting for a sophisticated holiday accent.
